executives.name: Donald Penner
executives.background: Mr. Penner is a Professional Geologist with over 40 years of experience in the mineral exploration industry. He has worked for both major and junior mining companies and has been involved in the discovery and development of several mineral deposits. He has served as a director and officer of several public mining companies.

executives.name: Scott Price
executives.background: Mr. Price has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, with a focus on project management and development. He has served as a director and officer of several public mining companies and has been involved in the development of several mineral projects in North America.

board_of_directors.name: Donald Penner
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Penner is a Professional Geologist with over 40 years of experience in the mineral exploration industry. He has worked for both major and junior mining companies and has been involved in the discovery and development of several mineral deposits. He has served as a director and officer of several public mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Pete Dasler
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Dasler is a Professional Geologist with over 40 years of experience in the mineral exploration and mining industry. He has served as a director and officer of several public mining companies and was the President and CEO of Canex Metals Inc.
